rules.name: block_external_llm_for_pii_tools
rules.reason: External LLM is disabled in this policy. Use the in-house model.

rules.name: block_gpt4_via_payload_predicate
rules.reason: GPT-4 calls require explicit allow-list (ADR-008 payload predicate example).

rules.name: escalate_complex_human_calls
rules.reason: Complex-domain human callouts require an oncall review.
